name: 赖莉·德尔雷伊
name_full: 赖莉·德尔雷伊 Riley Del Rey
introduction: Riley Del Rey is an American actress, director, and film and TV producer. Her pictures span a range of styles, from dark comedy, political drama, and noir to slasher. Del Rey's personal life, public image, and performances have often sparked controversy and received widespread media coverage.She is best known for elevating Albuquerque, New Mexico as an entertainment and performer capital by writing, producing and directing, for rising New Mexican talent. She stars opposite NM superstar Clint Obenchain (Better Call Saul, Keyhole Gardens) in Thought I Lost You, and for writing and producing the autobiographical TV pilot Capitol Barbie, in which rising star Elese Jones plays a version of Del Rey.
